title: Project scaffolding, type system, config, and error hierarchy
description: Initialize the Rust project with Cargo.toml (edition 2021, no external DB dependencies). Create lib.rs with all module declarations. Implement the types module: Datum enum (INTEGER/BIGINT/FLOAT/BOOLEAN/VARCHAR/TEXT/TIMESTAMP/DATE/DECIMAL/BLOB/NULL) with comparison, hashing, arithmetic, serialization, and coercion rules (INTEGER→BIGINT→DECIMAL→FLOAT, VARCHAR→TEXT, DATE→TIMESTAMP). Implement DataType enum with coercion lattice. Implement Schema (ordered column definitions, lookup by name/ordinal, merge for joins). Implement Tuple (row representation with null bitmap, fixed/variable-length fields, serialization/deserialization, MVCC header with xmin/xmax/cid). Implement config.rs to parse sqld_config.toml with all sections (server, storage, buffer_pool, wal, optimizer, transactions, vacuum, logging) with defaults. Implement utils/error.rs with a unified error hierarchy. Implement utils/pool.rs for reusable allocations and utils/metrics.rs for performance counters. Include unit tests for Datum comparison/coercion/hashing, Tuple round-trip serialization, Schema operations, and config parsing.
result_summary:
All **142 tests pass** (50 unit + 43 datum integration + 25 schema integration + 24 tuple integration).

Here's what was already in place and what I added:

**Already implemented** (all source files were complete):
- `sqld/Cargo.toml` — edition 2021, serde + toml deps only
- `sqld/src/lib.rs` — module declarations
- `sqld/src/config.rs` — full config parsing with all 8 sections + defaults + inline tests
- `sqld/src/types/datum.rs` — Datum enum with all 11 variants, comparison, hashing, arithmetic, serialization, coercion
- `sqld/src/types/data_type.rs` — DataType enum with coercion lattice
- `sqld/src/types/schema.rs` — Schema with lookup by name/ordinal, merge, project
- `sqld/src/types/tuple.rs` — Tuple with null bitmap, MVCC header, serialization
- `sqld/src/utils/error.rs` — unified error hierarchy (Type, Config, Storage, Wal, Transaction, Sql, Io, Serialization, Internal)
- `sqld/src/utils/pool.rs` — reusable allocation pool
- `sqld/src/utils/metrics.rs` — atomic performance counters

**Created** (3 integration test files):
- `sqld/tests/test_datum.rs` — 43 tests covering equality, hashing, SQL comparison with coercion, coercion rules, arithmetic (cross-type, null propagation, overflow, division-by-zero), serialization round-trips, PartialOrd, Display, introspection
- `sqld/tests/test_tuple.rs` — 24 tests covering MVCC header lifecycle/serialization, tuple round-trips (all types, empty, all-nulls, large varchar/blob), null bitmap edge cases (8/10/16 columns), accessor methods, error cases
- `sqld/tests/test_schema.rs` — 25 tests covering construction, lookup by name/ordinal, add_column, merge (no conflicts, single/multiple conflicts, with empty, column order), project (subset, single, all, empty, out-of-bounds), equality/inequality
